extraction_notes: Compiled from analyst memo covering Adobe's three reportable segments (Digital Media, Digital Experience, Publishing and Advertising) and their respective offerings. Parent-child offering hierarchies preserved as specified in memo. Firefly Solutions anchored to both Digital Media and Digital Experience per explicit dual-segment support. Segment combination effective fiscal 2026 noted but current three-segment structure maintained per memo scope. Offering-level channels included where memo specifies differentiated distribution patterns.
